signatureMove.name: 21 Ghoul Salute
signatureMove.extraText: This attack can damage models outside this character's Melee Range and deals +1 Dmg for each other friendly Pirate with the Reload [...] ability within 4".

abilities.name: Worlds Old & New
abilities.description: If your faction is Shades when this model is deployed place a 50mm Water Feature within 6" and LoS on open ground. If your faction is Dominion, when a friendly Pirate within 6" Jogs it may ignore the effects of Slow (and Slow Carry). Once per turn.

abilities.name: Cutlass
abilities.description: If this model deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Old Pirate Curse
abilities.description: Target without [The Black Spot]: Enemy Pirates gain +1 Arcane Stat when targeting this character with an action. This character suffers 1 Wd during the Discard Step, until end of game. Then other enemies with [The Black Spot] lose it.

abilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
abilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.
